title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology presents an analysis of OpenClaw security risks affecting autonomous AI agents. The discussion covers six danger categories including prompt injection and credential exposure, examining how agent autonomy, tool access, and memory mechanisms create real-world vulnerabilities.
